meaning: 达尔汗[蒙古人民共和国北部城市]
examples: A young woman in an elaborate traditional headdress participates in a beauty pageant in Darhan, one of Mongolia’s largest cities.
The first part of the text describes the creation of Darhan Wang Banner, the formation of seven kings, seven kings'division of the territories and other historic events.
The aged and respected people who can't participate in wrestling will be given a title "Darhan", which is a lifelong honor. They have made great achievements and have fame and prestige.
